trans-unit.source: Enter a search term like “local weather” in your browser and see a real-time weather update for your current VPN location.
trans-unit.note: Standard text in a composer block
trans-unit.target: Inserìs un tiermin di ricercje come “meteo locâl” tal to navigadôr e viôt l’inzornament meteo in timp reâl pe tô posizion corinte de VPN.

trans-unit.source: Sign in to your favorite app or streaming site
trans-unit.target: Eseguìs l'acès ae tô aplicazion preferide o tal sît preferît di trasmissions di videos

trans-unit.source: Traveling abroad and need to access content from back home?
trans-unit.note: Standard text in a composer block
trans-unit.target: Sêstu in viaç pal forest e ti covente rivâ ai tiei contignûts disponibii a cjase tô?

trans-unit.source: Connect to the country server of your choice
trans-unit.note: Bullet ordered list item in a composer block
trans-unit.target: Conetiti al servidôr dal paîs che tu desideris

trans-unit.source: Sign on to your favorite app or streaming site
trans-unit.note: Bullet ordered list item in a composer block
trans-unit.target: Jentre te tô aplicazion preferide o tal sît preferît di trasmissions video

trans-unit.source: Test your geolocation on one of our 400+ worldwide servers in two super simple ways:
trans-unit.target: Fâs une prove di rilevament de tô posizion gjeografiche suntun dai 400 e plui servidôrs sparniçâts ator pal mont in dôs semplicis manieris:

trans-unit.source: Is my VPN connected to the right server location?
trans-unit.target: Ise la mê VPN colegade ae posizion dal servidôr juste?
